seo.title: RAG Retrieval Quality Optimization in Vercel AI SDK Agents
seo.description: How to detect and fix rag retrieval quality optimization in Vercel AI SDK agents. Framework-specific detection, fixes, and Vex automation.

content.intro: In Vercel AI SDK, RAG Retrieval Quality Optimization issues manifest as poor chunk relevance, embedding mismatches, and context overflow during streaming responses from `generateText` or `streamText`. Agents often retrieve irrelevant documents due to suboptimal vector search parameters or unoptimized embeddings, leading to hallucinations in Server-Sent Events (SSE) streams. This is exacerbated by the framework's emphasis on low-latency streaming UIs where retrieval happens inline without caching or quality gates.

howItManifests.symptom: Streaming chunks contain unrelated document snippets mid-response
howItManifests.impact: Partial hallucinations appear in real-time UI before full response

howItManifests.scenario: Default embedding models with poor semantic matching
howItManifests.symptom: Top-k results dominated by keyword matches instead of semantic relevance
howItManifests.impact: Agent confidently cites wrong sources, eroding user trust

howItManifests.scenario: No metadata filtering in retrieval pipeline
howItManifests.symptom: Retrieved chunks exceed token limits with low signal-to-noise ratio
howItManifests.impact: Edge function timeouts during context stuffing in complex queries

howItManifests.symptom: Context includes outdated/irrelevant versions of same document
howItManifests.impact: Inconsistent structured outputs across streaming chunks

detection.name: Retrieval Relevance Score Monitor
detection.description: Logs cosine similarity scores for top-5 retrieved chunks during `streamText` calls

detection.name: Context Overflow Detector
detection.description: Measures token count vs relevance density in RAG prompt construction

detection.name: Hallucination Drift Tracker
detection.description: Compares streaming chunk consistency against retrieved context

fixes.name: Hybrid Search with Re-ranking
fixes.description: Combines BM25 keyword + semantic search with Cohere re-ranker

fixes.name: Adaptive Chunking + Metadata Enrichment
fixes.description: Dynamic chunk sizing based on embedding quality with rich metadata

fixes.name: Retrieval Quality Gates for Streaming
fixes.description: Pre-streaming validation with fallback to web search

vexAutomation.heading: Automating RAG Retrieval Quality Optimization Detection with Vex
vexAutomation.description:
Vex middleware automatically instruments all `generateText` and `streamText` calls in Vercel AI SDK, capturing retrieval metadata, embedding scores, and streaming chunk consistency. It detects low-relevance retrieval (<0.75 cosine similarity), context overflow (>90% token usage with <60% relevance density), and hallucination drift (>40% chunk divergence from source docs). 

Remediation workflows trigger hybrid search reranking, metadata filtering, or fallback strategies when quality thresholds fail. Vex dashboards provide real-time retrieval analytics across deployments, with one-click rollout of optimized chunking strategies. The SDK integration requires zero code changes beyond middleware registration.

cta.heading: Detect and Fix This Automatically with Vex
cta.description: Add one line of Vex middleware to eliminate 85% of RAG retrieval failures across your Vercel AI SDK deployments.
